title: cereus zehntneri
intro: Cereus zehntneri, also known as the 'Zehntner's Pincushion Cactus', is a species of cactus native to Ecuador. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain, due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides in its stems. The health benefits of Cereus zehntneri include its use as an anti-inflammatory agent, antiseptic, and antipyretic, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments.
